title: Show billed cost with new and cached token totals
action: Keep the existing pricing calculation, but replace the misleading combined-token display with a cost-first session summary that reports billed USD, non-cache-read tokens as new, and cache-read tokens separately as cached.

truths: The displayed billed cost still includes cache-read cost at 0.1x input pricing
new excludes cache_read_input_tokens and includes input, output, and cache creation
The status line no longer presents new and cached tokens as one undifferentiated total
prohibitions: Do not change pricing rates or transcript deduplication

trace.outcome: Cost-first status line separates non-cache-read and cached tokens while retaining cache-read billing.
trace.verify_output: $22 billed · 1.1M new · 18.5M cached; node --check PASS; bash -n PASS; cache replay PASS
